evidenceNeeded: Confirm v3.5 page, docs, CSV, JSON, screenshots, and links contain fake/sample data only.
acceptanceProof: Public redaction checklist signed as public-safe.

evidenceNeeded: State advisory role, assumptions, scope, limits, and no-approval claim.
acceptanceProof: Boundary note visible and separate from authority decision.

evidenceNeeded: Declare initial developer/custodian role and any conflicts or dependencies.
acceptanceProof: Conflict/custody note accepted by meeting chair.
escalationRoute: Ask authority group to accept or vary

evidenceNeeded: Provide private proof of who can approve, object, defer, or stop the pilot.
acceptanceProof: Authority quorum and delegation recorded privately.

evidenceNeeded: Approve purpose, collective benefit, data classes, access, retention, deletion, reporting, and return route.
Approve notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, minimisation, retention, provider checks, and incident response.
Show private workspace, admin owner, backups, export, delete, restore, logging, and access controls.
Test least privilege, MFA, reviewer access, provider denial, revoke, and audit log capture.
acceptanceProof: Access and revoke test passed privately.

evidenceNeeded: Confirm official forms, chartering, payments, member numbers, signatures, and acceptance records stay outside the pilot tool unless separately approved.
Confirm support owner, response clock, pause trigger, breach assessment, escalation, and participant support route.
acceptanceProof: Support and incident route staffed or held.

evidenceNeeded: Confirm any provider sees fake/sample package only until contract, authority, privacy, and role access approval.
Prepare plain-language notice, voluntary participation wording, withdrawal, correction, and support clauses.
acceptanceProof: Notice/consent draft ready for private approval.

evidenceNeeded: Test a fake request to withdraw, correct, restrict, or delete a record.
acceptanceProof: Test result and owner route recorded privately.

evidenceNeeded: Name review date, deletion/retention owner, archive decision, access revocation, and public summary route.
Convert action items into a private agenda with motions, owner asks, blocked gates, and decision sequence.
acceptanceProof: Agenda ready and public-safe summary approved.

evidenceNeeded: Prepare go/hold/no-go record with conditions, expiry, stop triggers, unresolved holds, and signoff route.
acceptanceProof: Decision record shell ready before meeting.

evidenceNeeded: Publish only aggregate status, owner type, blocker class, and next route without private evidence.
acceptanceProof: Public status update is redacted and non-authority.
